clients:"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"code":"# stdio transport (Claude Desktop, etc.)\nmnemosyne mcp\n\n# SSE transport (web clients)\nmnemosyne mcp --transport sse --port 8080\n\n# Scoped to a specific memory bank\nmnemosyne mcp --bank project_a\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["The MCP server exposes 6 tools: ",["$","code",null,{"children":"mnemosyne_remember"}],",
